phases.name: module
phases.prompt: Write a Python module 'calculator.py' that defines a class Calculator with methods add(a, b), subtract(a, b), multiply(a, b), and divide(a, b). divide must raise ValueError on division by zero. Include a module-level docstring. Output ONLY the complete contents of calculator.py inside a single ```python code block, nothing else.
